name: Balaji Pasam
title: Network Engineer
professional_summary: Over 3 years of experience as a Network Engineer with a strong track record in designing, implementing, and optimizing network infrastructures. Expertise in networking technologies, automation, and security with a focus on collaboration and problem-solving. Proven ability to lead network projects, enhance performance, and improve security.

responsibilities: Developed and maintained comprehensive network documentation, including risk assessments, to ensure a proactive security posture.
Designed and implemented a robust network architecture to support over 250 concurrent users, improving user experience.
Optimized Arista switch configurations and WAN connections to increase network performance by 40%, while implementing QoS policies.
Enhanced security measures, reducing potential vulnerabilities by 30%, and integrated Arista CloudVision for a 25% improvement in troubleshooting.
Provided timely technical support for network incidents and conducted regular performance assessments to maintain optimal network operations.
Collaborated closely with IT security teams to enforce strict network access controls, strengthening overall network security.
Conducted code reviews for network-related changes to ensure adherence to best practices and security standards.
Performed latency reduction techniques to improve the responsiveness of critical applications.
Deployed Cisco FTD and Palo Alto NGFW firewall solutions, resulting in a 50% reduction in security breaches.
Optimized BGP and OSPF routing protocols, improving network convergence times by 40%.
Implemented Cisco FTD for data center network automation, reducing provisioning times by 30%.
Designed and maintained a secure SD-WAN solution for 50+ bank branches, ensuring efficient connectivity.
Managed a high-availability WAN infrastructure supporting 50,000+ users and critical applications.
Configured and maintained reliable MPLS circuits for efficient data transfer.
Enhanced network visibility and control using Cisco Prime Infrastructure for management and monitoring.
Utilized Nagios and PRTG Network Monitor for real-time performance monitoring and proactive alerting.
Improved network programmability and automation using Arista EOS, reducing manual configuration errors.
Developed and enforced comprehensive network security policies, including firewall rules, VPN configurations, and access control lists (ACLs).
Implemented API integrations with cloud platforms to facilitate seamless data exchange and improve overall system interoperability.
